temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A silhouetted figure of a man stands with his back to the camera, looking out over a vast, dark, and cloudy sky. The clouds are illuminated from below by a bright, ethereal light source, creating a dramatic and somber atmosphere. The Chinese characters '风行网' (Feng Xing Wang) are superimposed in the top-left corner. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and contemplative mood, introducing a solitary character facing an imposing, natural backdrop.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, resonant, and slightly ominous choral or orchestral score begins to play, setting a serious tone.)
(00:04-00:05) The scene rapidly darkens, transitioning from the cloudy sky to complete blackness in a single, swift motion. The silhouetted figure remains visible for a moment before the screen goes completely dark. (Storyline: This transition acts as a dramatic cut, ending the introductory scene and moving the narrative forward without context.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The dramatic choral music continues, swelling slightly as the screen fades to black.)
